summary: Full backend and frontend testing of DeplyzeGPT Vision AI app. All 7 backend tests passed. All UI flows working correctly including file upload, model selection, Gemini analysis, YOLO26 analysis, suggestion chips, slash commands, and error handling.

issues: Right column (output panel) text content not visible in Playwright screenshots due to dark theme rendering, but content confirmed extracted via evaluate() - not a real issue

critical_code_review_comments: YOLO model returns 0 detections for synthetic test images (colored shapes) - this is expected behavior, not a bug. Real photos with COCO-class objects would trigger detections
Uploads stored in /tmp - will be lost on container restart (ephemeral storage) - consider persistent storage for production
seed_data_creation: Test JPEG image created at /tmp/test_image.jpg (400x300px with colored shapes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified: upload, gemini analysis, yolo26 analysis, model selection (orange border on selected), suggestion chips (3 appear after gemini analysis + clickable), slash commands (/detect switches to yolo26, /seg switches to yolo26-seg), upload error for invalid file types, analyze button disabled with no file. Backend: health, upload JPEG, invalid upload rejected (400), file serving, Gemini image analysis (returns type:text + suggestions), YOLO26 image analysis (returns type:image + base64). YOLO model already downloaded (yolo26n.pt present). testids: model-card-{id}, media-upload-zone, file-input, chat-prompt-input, analyze-send-button, slash-command-menu, suggestion-chip, upload-error-message, clear-upload-button
